label: Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning

node.label: Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning
node.definition: Populations of candidate solutions are selected, mutated, recombined, or coordinated without gradient requirements.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning is modeled as depending on Optimization theory, Probability theory and feeding downstream nodes such as AutoML & automated model design, Neural architecture search.
examples: atlas downstream link to AutoML & automated model design
atlas downstream link to Neural architecture search
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Probability theory.
